name: How is fault decided in a work neck injury comp case Saint George?
description: No-fault system; just prove work connection.

mainEntity.name: How is fault decided in a work neck injury comp case Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: No-fault system; just prove work connection.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp is no-fault; benefits owed regardless of your or employer's fault if work-related.** Strict liability for covered injuries.[3] Key factors: Only prove arose out of employment; idiopathic falls may qualify if work worsened.[3] No lawsuits against boss. Focus on causation evidence.
